title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: A finite, deterministic, zero-sum game. Can you force a win, or is a draw inevitable?

title: Memory Match
description: Minimize the expected number of turns using perfect working memory and statistical analysis.

title: Neon Snake
description: Manage a FIFO data structure on a grid. Avoid self-intersection and maximize your Hamiltonian path.

title: Brick Breaker
description: Master the law of reflection and paddle-physics in this Newtonian kinematic challenge.

title: Cyber Runner
description: Navigate AABB collision tiles using gravitational acceleration and vertical impulse vectors.

title: Road Crosser
description: Solve relative motion problems across lanes of moving objects with constant velocity.

title: Whack-a-Bug
description: A test of hand-eye coordination against a Poisson arrival process of system bugs.

title: Star Siege
description: Defend against synchronized alien formations using high-velocity projectile motion.

title: Flutter Bird
description: Manage a one-dimensional control problem using gravitational acceleration and upward impulses.

title: Cyber Mine
description: Deduce safe nodes using logical inference and conditional probability in a hazardous field.
